title: gdb bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[16.3-2.0.1]
Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u1
  Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  Oracle history:
  June-27-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-4.1.0.1
  -  Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
     Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  May-28-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-4.1.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  Mar-05-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-4.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  Jan-23-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-3.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  - OraBug 35407694 Interrupting pstack with ctrl+c  prompts for a kill even if process is not spawned by gdb
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  - OraBug 36055910 Support RDTSCP in RECORD/REPLAY in interpreter mode (record full)
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>

[16.3-2.el10]
- Backport fixes to decoding AMD64 instructions
  Resolves: RHEL-93581

[16.3-1.el10]
- Rebase RHEL10 GDB to 16.3
  Resolves: RHEL-56897
  Resolves: RHEL-91382

* Wed May 28 2025 Andrew Burgess <aburgess@redhat.com>
- Remove 32-bit ARM support for RHEL 10+.  This is not a RHEL
  supported target, so lets drop this target.  Retain for older RHEL
  versions, as well as Fedora.

[16.3-1]
- Rebase to FSF GDB 16.3.
  Deleted: gdb-rhbz2354997-gstack-drop-readnever.patch

[16.2-3]
- Backport 'Fix gstack issues' from upstream.
  (Keith Seitz, RH BZ 2354997)

[16.2-2]
- Bump the release number.

[16.2-1]
- Rebase to FSF GDB 16.2.
  Dropped:  gdb-backport-buildid-related-changes.patch
            gdb-catchpoint-re-set.patch
            gdb-remove-qnx-neutrino-support.patch
  Modified: gdb-add-rpm-suggestion-script.patch

* Thu Jan 23 2025 Alexandra Hajkova <ahajkova@redhat.com>
- Remove upstreamed gdb-6.3-gstack-20050411.patch.

* Fri Jan 17 2025 Guinevere Larsen <guinevere@redhat.com>
- remove gdb-test-bt-cfi-without-die.patch.  This test has been
  accepted upstream and will make its way back to testing with
  the GDB 17 release.
full_text:
[16.3-2.0.1]
Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u1
  Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  Oracle history:
  June-27-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-4.1.0.1
  -  Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
     Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  May-28-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-4.1.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  Mar-05-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-4.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  Jan-23-2025 Claudiu Zissulescu <claudiu.zissulescu-ianculescu@oracle.com> - 14.2-3.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol10-u0
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  - OraBug 35407694 Interrupting pstack with ctrl+c  prompts for a kill even if process is not spawned by gdb
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  - OraBug 36055910 Support RDTSCP in RECORD/REPLAY in interpreter mode (record full)
    Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>

[16.3-2.el10]
- Backport fixes to decoding AMD64 instructions
  Resolves: RHEL-93581

[16.3-1.el10]
- Rebase RHEL10 GDB to 16.3
  Resolves: RHEL-56897
  Resolves: RHEL-91382

* Wed May 28 2025 Andrew Burgess <aburgess@redhat.com>
- Remove 32-bit ARM support for RHEL 10+.  This is not a RHEL
  supported target, so lets drop this target.  Retain for older RHEL
  versions, as well as Fedora.

[16.3-1]
- Rebase to FSF GDB 16.3.
  Deleted: gdb-rhbz2354997-gstack-drop-readnever.patch

[16.2-3]
- Backport 'Fix gstack issues' from upstream.
  (Keith Seitz, RH BZ 2354997)

[16.2-2]
- Bump the release number.

[16.2-1]
- Rebase to FSF GDB 16.2.
  Dropped:  gdb-backport-buildid-related-changes.patch
            gdb-catchpoint-re-set.patch
            gdb-remove-qnx-neutrino-support.patch
  Modified: gdb-add-rpm-suggestion-script.patch

* Thu Jan 23 2025 Alexandra Hajkova <ahajkova@redhat.com>
- Remove upstreamed gdb-6.3-gstack-20050411.patch.

* Fri Jan 17 2025 Guinevere Larsen <guinevere@redhat.com>
- remove gdb-test-bt-cfi-without-die.patch.  This test has been
  accepted upstream and will make its way back to testing with
  the GDB 17 release.

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20405-0.html
